---
title: "Probability Theory II: Martingales, Brownian Motion, and Stochastic Calculus Foundations"
subtitle: "CORE-006 | Core Mathematics — Year 1"
description: "Advanced probability covering martingale theory, Brownian motion, and the foundations of stochastic calculus. Essential for stochastic modeling in every domain track."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Probability Theory II: Martingales, Brownian Motion, and Stochastic Calculus Foundations

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
